critiques.finding: ai_RNbBHXjO milestones-tab-content renders placeholder prose instead of IR milestones subtree; acceptable for JOURNAL-01 tab-visibility scope but not a distinct implemented layout with data.
critiques.alternative: Land JOURNAL-05 MilestonesTab as milestonesTab prop or document explicit deferral in coverage when milestones panel is toggled.

critiques.finding: Brownfield journal entries UI inside ai_RNbBHXim lacks JOURNAL-02 bubble ids (ai_RNbBHXin actions row, ai_RNbBHXiu grid, ai_RNbBHXiv card template) and uses shadcn/Tailwind styling instead of IR style_refs.
critiques.alternative: JOURNAL-02 should replace the prototype toolbar/card block passed as journalTab with migrated components while preserving tab chrome from JOURNAL-01.

critiques.finding: journalTabStore.ts exports useJournalTabStore local hook state, not a shared store; naming may mislead future items expecting cross-component tab persistence.
critiques.alternative: Rename to useJournalTabs or lift tab state to Journal.tsx context if popups need to respect active tab.

critiques.finding: JournalTabBar adds responsive Tailwind overrides (max-w-md, flex-1, border-0) atop Group_tab_bar_ / Button_tab_* classes; minor layout delta from IR fixed tab bar.
critiques.alternative: Reconcile fit_width fluid semantics from IR presentation when responsive pass is scheduled.
